prompt: Dear Sir, I want to study online because I am an engineer and I don't have much free time to take a course in a normal school. Therefore I want to find a online course which I can take a course in anytime and anywhere. The subjects which I want to learn are English and Japanese. Because I have many chances to communicate with the foreign customers. So I hope that I can improve my ability of language. I think I can read and write English very well. But the abilities of hearing and speaking are very weak. So I want have more chances to practice English with foreigners. I hope I can be easy to talk to foreigner in English after I finish the course. Japanese is secondary foreign language which I want to learn. But I did not have any experience about learning Japanese. So I need a easy course of learning Japanese to help me to develop my ability of Japanese. I hope I can do some easy communication with Japanese after I finish the course. Best regards, Vega Hsieh
